title: Pouteria brousmichei
taxonomy: Pouteria brousmichei is classified as a species within the family Sapotaceae, a family of flowering plants that includes over 900 species. This family is a part of the order Ericales, which is a large group of flowering plants that includes a wide range of species. Pouteria brousmichei is a tropical tree species, and its classification is further divided into the genus Pouteria, which includes several species of trees and shrubs. This classification helps in understanding the plant's evolutionary relationships and its position within the plant kingdom.
